chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * | select arbitrary(__time__) as time_t, date_format(from_unixtime(__time__ - __time__ % 60), '%H:%i') as time,  case when length(proxy_alternative_upstream_name) > 0 then proxy_alternative_upstream_name else proxy_upstream_name end  as proxy_upstream_name,  round((sum(body_bytes_sent) + sum(request_length)) / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 3)    group by time, proxy_upstream_name  order by time_t  limit 1440
chartQueries.tokenQuery: ${{ServiceA|default-http-svc1-80}} or ${{ServiceB|default-http-svc2-80}}  | select arbitrary(__time__) as time_t, date_format(from_unixtime(__time__ - __time__ % 60), '%H:%i') as time,  case when length(proxy_alternative_upstream_name) > 0 then proxy_alternative_upstream_name else proxy_upstream_name end  as proxy_upstream_name,  round((sum(body_bytes_sent) + sum(request_length)) / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 3)    group by time, proxy_upstream_name  order by time_t  limit 1440

search.query: * | SELECT url from ( select  (url_extract_path(url))  as url, count(1) as total from log  group by url  order by total desc   limit 100 )
* | SELECT host from ( select  host  as host, count(1) as total from log  group by host  order by total desc   limit 100 ) having host is not null
